message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Caller" as Caller
rectangle "ServeurDnamease" as ServeurDnamease
rectangle "Asterisk" as Asterisk
actor "CalledDnamease" as CalledDnamease

activate ServeurDnamease
Caller -> ServeurDnamease : clickButton
activate ServeurDnamease
ServeurDnamease -> ServeurDnamease : Verification
deactivate ServeurDnamease
activate ServeurDnamease
ServeurDnamease -> Asterisk : Create conference room
activate Asterisk
Asterisk --> ServeurDnamease
ServeurDnamease -->> Caller : Ask_to_call_the_trunk_number
ServeurDnamease -->> CalledDnamease : Ask_to_call_the_trunk_number_with information_of_the _caller
deactivate ServeurDnamease
Caller -> Asterisk : Call_With_Trunk_Number
CalledDnamease -> Asterisk : Call_With_Trunk_Number
deactivate Asterisk
note over ServeurDnamease, Asterisk: When the communication is ending
Asterisk --> ServeurDnamease : communication ending
@enduml
```
